simple_types.name: DEVICEADDRTYPE_DEVICEADDRTYPE_Field

simple_types.name: OVERRIDEEN_BLE_1MBIT_Field
simple_types.code:
type OVERRIDEEN_BLE_1MBIT_Field is
   Override,
   Notoverride)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Override
enumeration_literals.description: Do not override the default values for BLE_1Mbit mode.

simple_types.name: OVERRIDEEN_NRF_1MBIT_Field

enumeration_literals.name: Override
enumeration_literals.description: Do not override the default values for NRF_1Mbit mode.

simple_types.name: PPFC_PPFC_Field
simple_types.code:
type PPFC_PPFC_Field is
   Present,
   Notpresent)
  with Size => 8;

mode.
